title: Rename device - new name on the FMD connected card
scenario: Renamed device name does not update on the connected card in the Find My Device screen after renaming in Settings
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. From the Home screen, tap the Settings icon (gear icon).
3. In the Settings menu, tap on the connected device name to access Device Settings.
4. In Device Settings, tap on 'Rename' (or the pencil/edit icon next to the device name).
5. Enter a new name for the device (e.g., 'My Poly Headset').
7. Navigate back to the Home screen.
8. Tap on the 'Find My Device' (FMD) option or screen.
9. Observe the connected device card displayed on the FMD screen.
expected: The new name entered in step 5 is correctly displayed on the connected device card in the Find My Device (FMD) screen.
